programme.title: Movie: Underworld: Rise of the Lycans
programme.desc: Lucian, a young Lycan, becomes a powerful leader among the slave Lycans. He plans a rebellion against the vampires' rule with the support of his secret lover and vampire, Sonja.

programme.title: Killing Eve: Management Sucks
programme.desc: Eve and Carolyn are reeling. Eve strikes up an unlikely alliance with Kenny's colleagues at the Bitter Pill. Villanelle finds that management isn't all it's cracked up to be.

programme.title: Hidden Habitats: Serengeti
programme.desc: Take a peek at one of the most famous habitats on Earth the Serengeti. This vast grassland is home to some of the greatest concentrations of herbivores in Africa.

programme.title: Attenborough and the Giant Elephant
programme.desc: The amazing life story of the most famous elephant to have ever lived: Jumbo. With scientists from around the world, Sir David has unique access to the elephant's skeleton at the American Museum of Natural History.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Melt
programme.desc: The summer melt of Arctic ice provides opportunities for millions of animals, including narwhal, beluga whales, families of Arctic foxes and vast colonies of seabirds. But for polar bears, it's the toughest time of year.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Salmon Run
programme.desc: A spectacular natural event takes place in North America every year as hundreds of millions of salmon return from the Pacific Ocean to the mountain streams where they were born. The salmon must overcome fierce torrents and leap over waterfalls.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Migration
programme.desc: Each year, over a million wildebeest and zebra invade the Serengeti grasslands making it a paradise for the predators that live there. We follow the moving story of one lion family's struggle to survive.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Tide
programme.desc: The Sardine Run is the world's largest gathering of predators; each winter a mighty army of ocean predators hunt the sardines gathering along South Africa's eastern coast; with the Run becoming less stable it has effects that run right up the food chain.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Flood
programme.desc: The yearly flood of the Okavango Delta turns 4,000 square miles of arid plains into wetland.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Feast
programme.desc: Every summer in the seas off Alaska, humpback whales, sea lions and killer whales depend on an explosion of plant life: the plankton bloom. It transforms these seas into the richest on Earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth: From Pole to Pole
programme.desc: The ultimate portrait of our planet looks at the key factors that shape our natural history. In the Arctic spring, a mother polar bear and cubs have two weeks to cross the frozen sea. Time-lapse cameras capture the transformation created by floods.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Mountains
programme.desc: A tour of the mountain ranges reveals how animals rise to the challenge of mountain life. The snow leopard finds habitat in the largest glaciers of the world.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Fresh Water
programme.desc: Follow the descent of rivers from their mountain sources to the sea. Witness unique and dramatic moments of animal behaviour, including a piranha frenzy and a showdown between otters and crocodiles.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Caves
programme.desc: Although often overlooked, caves are remarkable habitats with equally bizarre wildlife. This documentary provides a unique access to a hidden world of stalactites, stalagmites, snotites and troglodytes that brings a wealth of surprises.

programme.title: Unearthed: Inca Apocalypse: The Dark Evidence
programme.desc: The Inca capital of Cusco was said to be the site of untold gold and riches, and new discoveries at this mysterious site reveal the secrets behind this mighty empire's fall.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mysteries in the Alien Desert
programme.desc: The Nazca Lines in Peru are mysterious giant symbols; hundreds of alien looking drawings created more than 1000 years ago. Learn why their creators made vast images in the desert that only make sense from the air.

programme.title: Unearthed: Pompeii's Evil Twin
programme.desc: The lost city of Baiae was the Las Vegas of the ancient world, until a mysterious calamity caused it to sink into the sea. New discoveries reveal the secrets of this sin city that, like Pompeii, some experts believe was destroyed by a supervolcano.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ghosts of the Wild West
programme.desc: The gunfight at Tombstone's OK Corral turned Wyatt Earp into an American folk hero, and to find what really happened here, experts use the newest tech to discover what caused the fatal shootout and what it reveals about the dark secrets of the Wild West.

programme.title: Unearthed: Curse of the Seventh Wonder
programme.desc: The Lighthouse of Alexandria is one of the world's original Seven Wonders, but it could have been home to a mysterious superweapon, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate the secrets of this fabled death ray and its long-lost home.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secret History of the Sphinx
programme.desc: Recent forensic findings uncover the astonishing secrets of the world's most iconic monument, the great Sphinx at Giza. Join the extraordinary investigation as it reveals which pharaoh commissioned this colossal statue and why it was never finished.

programme.title: Unearthed: Dead Sea Scrolls: The Dark Truth
programme.desc: The Dead Sea Scrolls are one of the Holy Land's greatest mysteries, but new discoveries might finally reveal the hidden meaning behind the strange texts, and as experts get closer to unmasking their author, they find clues of an ancient apocalypse.

programme.title: Unearthed: Egypt's Buried City
programme.desc: There's a lost city buried in the Sahara, and evidence reveals it's home to Nefertiti, Tutankhamun, and the forbidden god of an outlawed religion. Experts uncover the secret doomsday that caused this strange place to disappear.

programme.title: Unearthed: Rome's Great Wall
programme.desc: Hadrian's Wall was built to guard the frontiers of the ancient Roman Empire. Now, discoveries reveal who the Romans were trying to keep out with this 72-mile-long megastructure, and what it tells us about the ancient people of Iron Age Britain.

programme.title: Unearthed: Alcatraz's Hidden Secrets
programme.desc: Alcatraz is home to secrets that only cutting-edge archaeology can reveal, and using the latest science and the newest tech, experts search for hidden evidence to investigate why so many tried and failed to escape America's toughest jail.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ramses' Buried Treasures
programme.desc: The treasures of Ramses II are found at Abu Simbel, a giant temple carved into a desert cliff over 3,000 years ago, and new discoveries at this marvel reveal the secrets of ancient Egypt's greatest pharaoh.

programme.title: Unearthed: Hunt for the First Pyramid
programme.desc: A strange site called Saqqara is home to Egypt's very first pyramid, and here, experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal why the ancient Egyptians started building pyramids and if the mummified animals found here are evidence of a bizarre religious cult.

programme.title: Unearthed: Vesuvius's Secret Victim
programme.desc: Scientists are using cutting edge technology to unearth a second city that, like the well-known city of Pompeii, was destroyed when Vesuvius erupted in 79 AD. This new town is revealed to be one of the most well-preserved Roman towns on earth.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Bail Out, Bail Out
programme.desc: An officer gets involved in a foot chase across the highway; the force uses a man's cigarettes to arrest him for theft.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: I Was Gonna Go Home
programme.desc: The team tracks a stolen vehicle, blocks it in, and captures a gang member.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Roxanne's First Fugitive
programme.desc: Detective Roxanne Lopez has two conflicting tips about where a sexual offender may be.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Last Dance
programme.desc: Two armed and masked intruders barge into a family home demanding money, and threaten to kill the children. The police search for one of the suspects - an exotic dancer.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: 15 Years Running
programme.desc: In 1993 a man was convicted of selling narcotics in South Carolina. He had already been incarcerated for a similar charge before and, not wanting to return to prison, failed to show up to serve his time.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Perfect Storm
programme.desc: Detectives track a fugitive wanted for the second-degree rape of a young woman barely out of high school.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: They're Hitting the Highway
programme.desc: A stolen vehicle is found abandoned, rolling backwards down the street.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: I Don't Think I Can Make It in Jail
programme.desc: The Task Force acquires a new piece of equipment and finds it to be very helpful. Later, the A.T.T.F helps the Newark police catch an armed robbery vehicle.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Nothing Good Happens After Midnight
programme.desc: The Task force realizes that finding cars are not their only job. They take down robbers, and then search for a man with a gun.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Let the Helicopter Take Him
programme.desc: The helicopter in the sky becomes useful when the team traces a wanted drug dealer driving in the area.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Chinatown Takedown
programme.desc: An immigrant accused of viciously murdering his own family may be hiding out in Manhattan's Chinatown neighbourhood.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Family Secret
programme.desc: Detective Roxanne Lopez meets a young woman who alleges that her uncle sexually molested her after a family barbecue.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Chasing a Ghost
programme.desc: Investigators search for a murder suspect in the towns and mountainsides of Puerto Rico, which proves to be a nightmare.

programme.desc: Task Force is looking for a woman promoting prostitution of young children.

programme.title: American Justice: What Happened to Carrie Culberson?
programme.desc: A cheerleader vanished from Blanchester in 1996 and her boyfriend was convicted of murder.

programme.title: American Justice: Free to Murder Again
programme.desc: The case of Kenneth McDuff, the most infamous sexual predator in Texas history, sent to death row for three murders.

programme.title: Nightwatch: We Give Thanks
programme.desc: Titus and Dan resuscitate an overdosing drug user just before all hope is lost; Brooke and Landon tend to a young girl with congenital heart issues; a team of fire fighters contain a fire before it can wreak havoc.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Life on the Line
programme.desc: Police officers Robb and Bethany find themselves in an armed standoff with a suspect who has holed up in an apartment complex. Meanwhile, Fire Rescue team Mayville and Stokes must put out a trailer fire that threatens to incinerate the rest of the park.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: Charles 'Chip' Huth and Kansas City SWAT head out on a high-stakes drug-warrant. The team will make simultaneous hits on two locations in the same apartment complex.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: It's a tense situation as Sgt. Paul Hamilton and his squad get caught up in a high-speed car chase to bring down a suspected auto theft ring. Later, Paul's squad joins Huth's to double their efforts and hit two houses at once.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: Sergeant Joe McHale and his tactical team are called in to coax an unstable man out of his hotel room after he stabs a hotel employee. But when the man turns the knife on himself, McHale and his squad must act quickly to save a life.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: A car used to rob a large cache of assault rifles is found parked outside a house in a Dallas suburb; a sniper must call out a possibly armed and dangerous suspect from his home; but when a young boy comes out, all strategies must be changed.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: Steve Claggett and Rich Emberlin are called out to help execute an arrest warrant on a gang of suspected crack-cocaine dealers barricaded inside a house; the SWAT team's tactical skills are put to the test as they overcome the barriers-to-entry.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: The Vanishing Teens
programme.desc: In the fall of 1991, rural Michigan is plunged into paranoia and fear when four local teenage girls vanish without a trace. The community is in lockdown as residents face up to the very real possibility that a predator walks among them.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Unholy Communion
programme.desc: A devoted fiancé makes a devastating discovery: his beloved partner Anne Boncella and her 8-year-old daughter have been brutally murdered. The ensuing investigation will unravel shocking secrets that have lain dormant in their seemingly peaceful hometown.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Black Sabbath
programme.desc: On Holy Saturday morning, one day before Sister Margaret Ann Pahl's 72nd birthday, she is viciously murdered in the chapel where she works. Police mount an investigation that will unearth the shocking lies and sadistic secrets leading to her death.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Cabin Fever
programme.desc: After they fail to turn up for an annual maple tapping celebration, Ian and Nancy Blackburn's lifeless bodies are discovered stuff into the trunk of their own car. The whirlwind investigation will unmask a monster who hid in plain sight.

programme.title: Raw Terror: Cabin in the Woods
programme.desc: Christina Woods was reported missing by her mother Mary. Detectives uncover a complicated web involving Christina's husband Troy, her best friend Brooke and Brooke's husband Dan. Her body was found 600 miles away.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Hollywood Ripper
programme.desc: Four young women attacked, only one survivor; Maureen Maher has been on the trail of serial killer Michael Gargiulo for more than a decade. Learn how she helped crack one of the cases.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Hollywood Ripper on Trial
programme.desc: The story of Michael Gargiulo, a serial killer known as 'The Hollywood Ripper.' Michael is accused of killing three women, and attempting to kill another who lived to bear witness against him.

programme.title: Raw Terror: Cabin in the Woods
programme.desc: Christina Woods was reported missing by her mother Mary. Detectives uncover a complicated web involving Christina's husband Troy, her best friend Brooke and Brooke's husband Dan. Her body was found 600 miles away.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Cabin Fever
programme.desc: After they fail to turn up for an annual maple tapping celebration, Ian and Nancy Blackburn's lifeless bodies are discovered stuff into the trunk of their own car. The whirlwind investigation will unmask a monster who hid in plain sight.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Defenseless
programme.desc: A car races up to the ER of a Westchester hospital. Carlos Perez-Olivo, the driver, has been shot in his side and his wife, Peggy has been shot in the head. What horror has befallen this couple? The answer will challenge even experienced investigators.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Football Fatale
programme.desc: Star Washington Redskins safety Sean Taylor is shot dead by an intruder in his Miami home. And when it comes to the rich and famous, it seems like everybody has a motive...

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: In the Blink of an Eye
programme.desc: A young woman working at a convenience store is abducted from behind the counter in the middle of the night. She becomes the first of three women in the small town to disappear under shockingly similar circumstances.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Lifetime of Questions
programme.desc: As a 4-year-old girl, Heidi Jones discovered her mother's lifeless body on the living room floor. As an adult she guides police on a relentless quest to find her mother's killer.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Rocky Mountain Mystery
programme.desc: When a young woman disappears on a cold night in Breckenridge Colorado, one of the state's darkest mysteries begins.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Last Night Before Murder
programme.desc: A young mother inexplicably disappears in the middle of the night only to be found savagely murdered the next morning.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Life Halted
programme.desc: When a young woman is savagely murdered in her own home, police and her family must find the clue hidden inside the blood-stained crime scene that will lead them to her killer.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: History Repeats Itself
programme.desc: When a young mother vanishes her trail goes cold. Until a shocking discovery reveals that history repeats itself.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Murder in Coralville
programme.desc: A young woman is found shot to death off the side of a dirt road. Police hope their best clue, the bullet found at the scene, will unmask her killer.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Love in Flames
programme.desc: Family tragedies send a couple's dream of a perfect life up in flames.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: No Accident
programme.desc: High school baseball coach Russell Stager is only separated from his wife for a few months when he meets Barbara. But less than a decade later, marital bliss will be replaced with a web of lies and betrayal that will push someone over the edge.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Big League Murder
programme.desc: Tommy and Tamara Kane appear to have it all. He's a pro football player for the Seattle Seahawks; she's a devoted mother living in Montreal. Distance keeps this couple together, but when Tommy's career ends, the proximity will tear them apart.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: A Watery Grave
programme.desc: Jeff and Jeanine Glanda have a picture-perfect family until selfishness and a shameless affair mark the beginning of the end. As money troubles and the threat of divorce breed paranoia and hate, a plot is hatched in the dark heart of a twisted killer.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: The Mystery of Rommel's Gold
programme.desc: In 1943, the Nazis looted $50 million in gold from the Jewish community in Djerba, Tunisia. The team tracks the loot to a dive site off Corsica, a pawn shop in Germany, and the family of an escaped Nazi in South America.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Kurt Lishka
programme.desc: The story of German housewife Beate Klarsfeld and her husband Serge, who helped track down former Paris Gestapo chief Kurt Lishka. Lishka ordered the arrest and murder of over 33,000 Jews yet lived as a free man in Germany for years.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Klaus Barbie
programme.desc: The husband and wife team of Serge and Beate Klarsfeld worked tirelessly to have Nazi war criminal Klaus Barbie extradited from Bolvia to stand trail in France. Barbie, known as 'The Butch of Lyon', was responsible for the deaths of 10,000 French Jews.

programme.title: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: The story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: Hitler's Messiah Complex
programme.desc: Discover how a series of psychotic episodes in his early life convinced Adolf Hitler that he was a modern day Pharaoh.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Adolf Eichmann
programme.desc: This is the hunt for Adolf Eichmann, considered by many to be one of the main architects of the Holocaust.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Erich Priebke
programme.desc: A half-century after the war, American journalists track down former Gestapo officer Erich Priebke. Priebke, who was responsible for some of Italy's worst atrocities, fled to Argentina after the war.

programme.desc: See how Nazi hunter Simon Wiesenthal tracked down fugitive war criminal Franz Stangl in Brazil. Stangl was responsible for the murder of over 800,000 people.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Adolf Eichmann
programme.desc: This is the hunt for Adolf Eichmann, considered by many to be one of the main architects of the Holocaust.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Head Quarters
programme.desc: Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Nazification
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler implemented changes through anti-Semitic clothing laws, the establishing of SS bride schools and breeding programmes that saw children stolen from their parents.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Transporting the Reich
programme.desc: At look at how Hitler's redesign of the German transport system was a key factor in his preparations for war, including how he used the car industry for the rearmament of his military and see his plans for a colossal rail system.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Making America
programme.desc: We all know of George Washington, the California Gold Rush, the vast highways that stretch across America, and the wars between the United States and Great Britain. Learn about the secrets behind the making of America.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Verge of Destruction
programme.desc: We've all heard about the fallout shelters used for refuge during World War II, the deadly firebombing of Tokyo, and the D-Day invasion on the beaches of Normandy but there are more secrets.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Bat Masterson: Defender of Dodge
programme.desc: This well-dressed gunfighter was a gambler, a hunter, an Indian fighter, and a scout; but above all else, Bat Masterson was a lawman. As Sheriff of Ford County, Kansas, Bat Masterson kept the peace on the volatile Frontier.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Dream House
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley stumble upon a pre-1900s Victorian after some curbside dumpster diving. They hit New Orleans for some perfect vintage decor then return to combine two rooms into one spacious kitchen and make this the dream house worth of the name.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Mystery House
programme.desc: Michael surprises Ashley with an 1893 raised cottage that he purchased before seeing the full interior. The duo soon finds themselves in over their heads when they realize it's not quite the hidden gem Michael thought it was.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: The Pink Shack
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley have their work cut out for them while restoring a dilapidated 1914 fixer-upper. They create a light-filled breakfast nook and repurpose a vintage wooden sign to transform a quaint pink corner house.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Duplex Conversion
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley learn that a coveted property is for sale while crabbing off the Galveston coast.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Off-The-Grid Renovation
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team renovate an off-the-grid hunting cabin deep in the woods of Oxford, ME. They have a budget of $20,000 and a time frame of six weeks. They face many challenges associated with building off-the-grid.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Kids' Dream Lake House
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team help a DIY homeowner jumpstart his project and renovate with kids in mind. With a budget of $30,000 and a July 1st deadline, the masters are going to have to use their imagination on this one.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Rebuilding The Old Schoolhouse
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team of Cabin Masters hike through the woods of Dedham, ME, to restore a dilapidated family camp that was once the old schoolhouse. A serious case of rot threatens to close down the entire project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Morrill Family Bunkhouse
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team of builders take on the old army barracks on their family camp that has served as overflow sleeping for over 40 years.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Ship-shape Shack
programme.desc: Chase and the team have their hands full transforming a family's treasured 1950s lobster shack into a cabin that will create a lifetime of memories for generations to come.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Breakfast Of Champions
programme.desc: Noah digs into morning meals with something for everyone, from the sinfully sweet Cinnamon Roll Waffle to the hearty and delicious Breakfast Poutine.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Get Him to the Greek Pizza
programme.desc: Noah Cappe's first stop is The Big Butler Fair in Butler, Penn., where he dines on a Euro-fusion Greek pizza, a crabby patty burger and a deep-fried chili dog, before finally tasting a fluffernutter elephant ear pasty.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Rainbow Confection
programme.desc: Noah Cappe lands at the LA County Fair in Pomona, Calif. for some sunny west coast eats, like the jackfruit torta, PB meatballs and cherry candy-coated cherry punch hot wings. Finally, Noah takes a tasty stroll through the rainbow Ice Cream Garden.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: 50 Shades of Crepe
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to Vancouver to sample some amazing eats, like the truly Canadian poutine stuffed burger, shrimp fried rice Balls, jerk chicken dumplings, and the Donuccino, a meal and a milkshake all in one.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Piefidelity
programme.desc: Noah Cappe knows where to find amazing fresh seafood at the Delaware State Fair in Harrington.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Good, the Bacon, the Ugly
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads for the Lone Star state to eat his way through the Texas State Fair in Dallas, featuring some inventive foods like the bacon-tilla and the indulgent masterpiece of chicken fried lobster.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: The Hamptons
programme.desc: Andrew dives into the seafood masterworks of the Hamptons. From delectable surf and turf to buttery lobster rolls, clam chowder to smoked bluefish pate, the Hamptons' dinner scene is sizzling.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chicago: A Second Bite
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern takes a bite of Chicago's humble, hearty and world-renowned food scene. From juicy rib tips to zesty Polish sausages to experimental and edible works of art, Chicago's eats stay true to its roots.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: The Other Florida
programme.desc: Get away from Florida's big cities and beaches to delve into the interior part of the state where the people and the food have an identity all of their own.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: San Diego
programme.desc: From wild vegetables to wild animals, Andrew gets a taste of the unexpected when he visits San Diego.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Best of the Midwest
programme.desc: From seriously saucy barbecue sandwiches to nachos on a pizza and the perfect burger for Dirty Dancing, these restaurants serve up some of the best dishes in America's heartland.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Eat, Drink, Play
programme.desc: Great food calls for great entertainment, and these places offer spectacles that make memorable side dishes to incredible meals, from Tex-Mex meatballs fueling music fans in Dallas to a comedy show featuring fresh Atlantic seafood in Maine.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: Beach Picnic
programme.desc: Tia Mowry has decided she's ready for some fun in the sun, and she's packing a picnic for her and her friend Jules at the beach.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: Blind Date
programme.desc: Tia Mowry is turning the cameras on one of her producers and setting him up on a blind date.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: Pajama Party
programme.desc: Tia Mowry's not even getting out of her pajamas to cook today; she's having friends over for some girl time and an old fashioned sleepover, where she makes herbs de Provence popcorn and roasted sweet potato wedges.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: Pizza Goes Healthy
programme.desc: Tia Mowry starts her day at one of her favorite neighborhood pizza places, where she orders up two amazing pizzas.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: It's All Relative

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Brunch Bites Across Europe
programme.desc: Bobby prepares a menu of European-inspired small bites.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Impress Your Guests
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay demonstrates how to prepare a jaw-dropping brunch without breaking a sweat.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Vermont Bed and Breakfast Style
programme.desc: Bobby creates a Vermont-style Bed & Breakfast menu with popovers and scrambled eggs.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Marrakesh Express Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay showcases the amazing spices and flavors of Morocco with this mouth-watering brunch. His menu includes: oatmeal with honey toasted apricots and pistachios; Moroccan eggs with flatbread and goat cheese.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoked and Stacked
programme.desc: Duff Goldman makes a guest appearance at Michael Symon's favorite Baton Rouge, La. smokehouse that boasts a pork belly hoagie so outrageous it has to be shared. Next up in St. Louis, a big fat Greek burger ignites Michael's cultural soul, and in Austin.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Hot and Spicy
programme.desc: Michael Symon digs into a spicy burger that uses four different types of peppers to fire up even the most adventurous eaters in Hell's Kitchen, New York City, before heading to Nashville, where he finds Southern comforts infused with Latin flavors.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Bayou Barbecue and Saucy Skillets
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Las Vegas, Nev., with a skillet full of pork belly chili and a mega-pancake that's the ultimate collision of apple pie and brunch.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Wild Smoke and Fiery Burgers
programme.desc: In Palm Springs, Calif., Michael Symon finds a spicy burger that ignites a four-alarm fire, and a chorizo-pineapple burger sings a perfect harmony of sweet and heat.

programme.title: Good Eats: Ill Gotten Grains
programme.desc: Take a look at the non-traditional grains couscous, wheat berries and bulgur.

programme.title: Good Eats: Use Your Noodle II: Fresh Pastai
programme.desc: Ravioli; Tortellini.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Golden State to Gizzards
programme.desc: Beginning in California and ending in Michigan, Noah Cappe explores creative carnival eats like the jalapeno cheese skirt burger and deep fried gizzards.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Michigan to Maize
programme.desc: Noah gets busy with the" Soul on a Roll" sandwich, and the "To Die For" casserole. Salted caramel apple gelato is the thing to beat the heat.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Cornfields to Canada
programme.desc: Noah Cappe kicks things off in Polk County, Minnesota, where he goes local with the North Woods sandwich and Barbe-chos. Then it’s across the border to the Red River Exhibition to experience a Canadian classic, prairie poutine.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Heatwave to Heartland
programme.desc: Summer is sizzling on the West Coast and Noah Cappe is ready to cool things down with a hazel nutty deep fried pop. Meanwhile, in the Midwest, Reverend Tom’s cowboy beans makes a believer out of fairgoers.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Hiro The Villain
programme.desc: Momakase blackmails Hiro into helping her steal her family's knives from Yama's safe.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Portal Enemy
programme.desc: Megan confronts Hiro about being a vigilante and threatens to tell Chief Cruz the truth.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Big Bugball Game/ Combat Camp
programme.desc: Anne must learn the value of teamwork to win the town’s annual Bugball game.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year
programme.desc: A scary mushroom adventure! Anne wins the prestigious “Frog of the Year” award and gets to plan her own party, but the frogs of Wartwood may not be ready for a human-style bash.

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: Maximum Venom: Web of Venom
programme.desc: When Spider-Man and Max Modell experiment on a sample of Venom symbiote, it escapes and unleashes a weapon of unknown purpose.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Something's Fishy
programme.desc: Hiro gets set up with 14-year-old Megan, leading him to wonder if he's missing out on a normal life. The team must deal with an upgraded High Voltage.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Something Fluffy
programme.desc: When mysterious but adorable creatures called Mayoi suddenly appear in San Fransokyo, Hiro is convinced that they’re part of some nefarious plot by Liv Amara.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Spin! Advance! Survive!
Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: That's Some Spicy Island Research!
programme.desc: Our heroes are visiting Poni Island for their school research projects, but they’re not the only ones with big plans.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Missing Links of Moorshire!
programme.desc: Dewey's natural golf abilities challenge Scrooge's ego while a seemingly innocent, mystical golf course leads the group into trouble.

programme.title: DuckTales: Beware the B.U.D.D.Y. System
programme.desc: Feeling menaced by tech genius Mark Beaks' newest invention, Launchpad recruits brilliant young scientist Fenton.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Fight Fighters
programme.desc: After being challenged to a video game battle by Wendy's boyfriend Robbie, Dipper is shocked when his favourite playable fighter, Rumble McSkirmish, comes to life to defend him. Dipper soon loses control over Rumble and has to find a way to stop him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Blendin's Game
programme.desc: Blendin Blandin returns to face off with Dipper and Mabel in a futuristic battle that could trap them forever in time jail.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Lost Harp of Mervana!
programme.desc: The family joins a zen mermaid society to find a missing mystery, but Louie is convinced the seemingly innocent mermaids have a villainous agenda of their own.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Photo Op/ Remy Rescue
programme.desc: Bill promises his family a trip to the mall food court but tricks them into going to a family portrait studio. Remy skips his violin lesson to hang out with Cricket.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Impopstar/ Football Camp
programme.desc: Cricket is mistaken for a pop star and decides to exploit the situation for all the perks of fame.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne or Beast?/ Best Fronds
programme.desc: Sprig tries to capture a mysterious beast to prove that he's responsible; Sprig takes Anne swimming in a nearby lake to help her feel less homesick.

programme.title: The Owl House: I Was a Teenage Abomination
programme.desc: Luz sneaks into the local magic school to help a friend and makes a new enemy in the process.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Deep End
programme.desc: When Mabel befriends a cute Merman trapped in the deep end of the public pool, she's determined to return him to his family in the ocean, even though that means her whirlwind romance will come to an end.

programme.title: Pickle and Peanut: Sewer Shark/ Swim Lessons
programme.desc: When Peanut's phone is swallowed by a shark swimming in a canal, Pickle tries to help but gets them both swallowed by the sewer shark.

programme.title: Pickle and Peanut: Greg/ Gramma Jail
programme.desc: Pickle lends his new pimple friend, Greg, to frenemy Lazer in hopes of landing an invitation to his cool party. Also, Pickle and Peanut accidentally get the sweet elderly Mam Mams arrested, so they have to break her out of 'gramma jail.'

programme.title: Pickle and Peanut: Pickle Adopts a Family/ Pickle the Falcon Master
programme.desc: Pickle wants a falcon so he can join the local falconry club, but Peanut acquires a parakeet from Sneaky Patty instead.

programme.title: Pickle and Peanut: Cookie Racket/ Busted Arm
programme.desc: Pickle bakes cookies from his grandma's recipe. Pickle breaks his arm while horsing around in the backyard.

programme.title: Pickle and Peanut: PAL-SCAN/ America's Sweetboy
programme.desc: Pickle and Peanut accidentally give a checkout machine life after trying to repair it. Peanut gets Pickle to compete in a contest at the mall.

programme.title: Pickle and Peanut: Body Spray/ Luxury Car Service
programme.desc: Pickle and Peanut cannot afford a bottle of the body spray they're fixated on so they make their own. Then, the boys are desperate to buy a pair of cool Turkey Wrap headphones made by rapper D-Stixx, so they start a car service for extra money.

programme.title: Pickle and Peanut: Wiz Fest / Gym Rats
programme.desc: Pickle and Peanut adventures.

programme.title: Pickle and Peanut: 90s Adventure Bear/ Parking Lot Carnival
programme.desc: Pickle and Peanut adventures.

programme.title: Pickle and Peanut: Volcano/ Bike Jumper
programme.desc: After YouTube star Bike Jumper is injured, Peanut must take his place doing daring jumps around town.

programme.title: Pickle and Peanut: Cart Rustlers / Swim Lessons
programme.desc: The boys go on a stakeout to uncover the mystery of the missing shopping carts and come face-to-face with notorious cart rustler Bloodbeard. Then, Peanut discovers that Pickle never learned to swim and takes him to the pool for lessons.

programme.title: Pickle and Peanut: Australia
programme.desc: When Peanut's uncle's uncle leaves him an inheritance, he and Pickle must cross the Australian Outback in order to retrieve it.

programme.title: Pickle and Peanut: Huge Reward/ Bear-I-cade
programme.desc: Pickle and Peanut are really looking forward to a “we-weekend” of just the two of them together for 48 hours straight.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Spit-Covered Cobbler
programme.desc: When Kandi's old car breaks down, Alan ends up leasing her a new one. Charlie warns him to break things off with her, but when Alan spends his last dime on Kandi's root canal and can't pay Judith's alimony, Charlie is forced to cover for him.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Golly Moses, She's a Muffin
programme.desc: Charlie's not happy when he learns that Kandi has been living in sin with Alan in his house, particularly because of his own recent dry spell with women. Things begin to look up for Charlie when a special visitor comes knocking on his door.

programme.title: The Draft 2020
programme.desc: A look at how the high school teams of this year's top draft picks acted as their launching pads into pro football.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Phoebe's Birthday Dinner
programme.desc: Phoebe and Joey wait for their friends to arrive for a celebration at a fancy restaurant.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Gone Cheatin'
programme.desc: A guys-only fishing trip changes when Carl invites Victoria, much to Mike's dismay.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Molly's Neverending Story
programme.desc: Molly's work on numerous drafts of her book begins to annoy Mike and the family.

programme.title: One World: Together at Home
programme.desc: This special, in support of the fight against the COVID-19 pandemic, will feature the real experiences from doctors, nurses and families around the world, and inspire people to take meaningful action to increase assistance for the COVID-19 response.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Ergo, the Booty Call
programme.desc: Alan has second thoughts about whether he should be dating a woman half his age and is mortified at the idea of introducing Kandi to Evelyn at Jake's birthday party. Meanwhile, Rose continues her passive-aggressive pursuit of Charlie.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Unfortunate Little Schnauser
programme.desc: Charlie boycotts an advertising awards banquet, having lost several years in a row to his cocky arch nemesis Archie. After devising a ploy to get him to attend, Alan, Evelyn and Jake accompany Charlie for support, until they get to know Archie.

programme.title: Mom: Triple Dip and An Overhand Grip
programme.desc: Bonnie and Tammy revisit childhood memories on a trip to their old foster home. Also, Christy and Jill regret accepting a date with two guys from their AA meeting.

programme.title: Mom: Finger Guns and a Beef Bourguignon
programme.desc: Christy discovers her new job at a law firm isn’t quite what she expected, and Bonnie’s therapist, Trevor, pushes her to confront her problem with procrastination.

programme.title: The World's Funniest Weather: Ship Happens
programme.desc: It's lights, camera, disaster for local meterologists, couples have second thoughts when their wedding day goes awry, and bad weather rocks the boat for weekend sailors.

programme.title: The World's Funniest Weather: Pool-itically Incorrect
programme.desc: Outdoor BBQ plans go up in flames, people literally find themselves on thin ice, and a sunny day at the pool isn't as relaxing as you think.

programme.title: Wipeout: It's a Dirty Job But Someone's Gotta Wipeout
programme.desc: Some of America's finest (and smelliest) employees who have made careers out of dirty jobs taken a turn around the 'Pooper Scooper,' the 'Bustodian' and the 'Roach Poacher.'

programme.title: In Search Ministries
programme.desc: Every worldview involves faith in some form; a commitment to applying reason and evidence to our search for ultimate answers to life's big questions.

programme.title: Freethought Matters: Valerie Tarico
programme.desc: Valerie Tarico visits.

programme.title: Full Court Press With Greta Van Susteren
programme.desc: A look at the impact of politics and policy on the American people.

programme.title: Elementary: Blood Is Thicker
programme.desc: When a beautiful young woman is murdered, Holmes and Watson investigate her ties to a billionaire CEO. Meanwhile, Mycroft makes a case for Sherlock to move back to London.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: The Kremps
programme.desc: The Goldbergs meet their new neighbours, the Kremps, an all-American family, very well put together and seemingly perfect. Beverly invites them over for a barbecue and gets no response, but nobody says no to Beverly Goldberg.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Stop Arguing and Start Thanking
programme.desc: Murray waits for his brother Marvin to visit for Thanksgiving. Beverly suggests Murray take it easy on Marvin, but Murray disagrees since his brother always makes the holiday stressful for the family.

programme.desc: Stay up-to-date with the most viral videos online.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Put Up Your Nukes

programme.title: Movie: Benny and Joon
programme.desc: A misfit who shelters his mentally ill sister stumbles onto the perfect companion for her.

programme.title: Movie: The Station Agent
programme.desc: A man who was born with dwarfism finds his solitude interrupted by a vendor and a woman.

programme.title: Movie: Boys and Girls
programme.desc: A friendship is put to the ultimate test when two best friends wind up in bed together.

programme.title: Movie: College
programme.desc: During an orientation visit at Fieldmont University, best friends Kevin, Carter and Morris fall in with one of the rowdiest fraternities on campus. As new recruits, they are subjected to endless humiliations and to the no-holds-barred college party scene.

programme.title: Movie: Wedding Daze
programme.desc: After losing the woman of his dreams, a man is convinced he'll never fall in love again. His best friend dares him to propose to a waitress. The dare evolves into the kind of love that both have been looking for all along.

programme.title: Movie: Rapture-Palooza
programme.desc: Two teens fight through a religious apocalypse in order to defeat the Antichrist.

programme.title: Movie: The Darjeeling Limited

programme.title: Movie: Raising Arizona
programme.desc: An eccentric, childless couple decide to kidnap one baby from a set of quintuplets.

programme.title: Movie: Betsy's Wedding
programme.desc: The parents of a bride and groom try to outdo each other while arranging the wedding.

programme.title: Movie: They Came Together
programme.desc: A man's company threatens to run a woman's shop out of business, yet the two still fall in love. When things go south, the archetypal couple must overcome a series of classic hurdles in the rom-com genre before finding their way back to one another.

programme.title: Movie: Rush Hour 2
programme.desc: Two police officers uncover a counterfeiting ring in Hong Kong and try to bring it down.

programme.title: Movie: Little
programme.desc: A woman with a high-pressure career is transformed into a younger version of herself.

programme.title: Movie: Big Momma's House 2
programme.desc: In order to get next to a computer expert whose new discovery may place national security at risk, Malcolm Turner must once again impersonate his grandmother. He poses as the hacker's nanny, but things get complicated when he gets close to the family.

programme.title: Movie: Punch Drunk Love
programme.desc: A beleaguered small-business owner embarks on a romantic journey with a mysterious woman.

programme.title: Black-ish: Sex, Lies and Vasectomies
programme.desc: Bow learns from her colleague that Dre never had the vasectomy a few years back that was supposedly scheduled, so she decides to see if he’ll come clean and tell the truth.

programme.title: Batwoman: Take Your Choie
programme.desc: As Kate is pulled between two sisters, Luke and Mary are tasked with finding the cause behind Beth's headaches. A visitor brings Jacob good news, Sophie takes her new role to the extreme, and Alice makes a devastating discovery.

programme.title: Supergirl: Reality Bytes
programme.desc: Man who dens' like that Dreamer is transgender and wants her to quit being a superhero attacks Nia's roommate. Dreamer refuses to give into his threats and puts herself in the line of fire to stop him.

programme.desc: Kramer's girlfriend coerces Jerry into wearing a puffy shirt on a television appearance.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Sniffing Accountant
programme.desc: Jerry thinks his accountant is using drugs; George has an interview to be a bra salesman.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Phoebe's Rats
programme.desc: Rachel is steamed when she learns that Monica invited her workplace rival to her party.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Monica Sings
programme.desc: Monica sings at a karaoke bar and is very exposed; Rachel and Gavin kiss.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Big But
programme.desc: Max finds herself wanting to be more than just friends with her pastry school partner, Deke. Meanwhile, Caroline is 'hot for teacher' -- the married Chef Nicholas.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Dumpster Sex
programme.desc: When Deke takes Max to his place after a great first date, his 'home' is nothing like she expected. Meanwhile, Carolyn feels empowered, then scared for her life, after having a shady car towed from the front of their apartment building.

programme.title: Entertainers With Byron Allen
programme.desc: Segment features Will Smith and Martin Lawrence, Brie Larson, Robert Downey Jr., Salma Hayek, the cast of Tyler Perry’s ‘A Fall from Grace’, Charlize Theron and Margot Robbie, Vanessa Graddick, John Cho, Greta Gerwig, Angelina Jolie and Justin Bieber.

programme.desc: Hilarious pranks are played on unsuspecting people and the results are caught on tape.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask

programme.title: Couples Court With the Cutlers: Havard vs. Hopkins
programme.desc: A woman’s distrust of her boyfriend’s suspicious behaviour has strained their relationship to the breaking point.

programme.desc: Dispute over catering services. Man sues over unauthorized use of his image.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Taxi Trouble/ Park at Your Own Risk
programme.desc: Confrontation with a taxi driver; a dispute over a parking citation.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV

programme.desc: A scorned Detroit woman summons her lover and his wife to Paternity Court to prove that he fathered her one-year-old daughter.

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: Barber Shop Makeover Takeover/ Photo Session Gone Wrong
programme.desc: Man sues for reimbursement made to barbershop; woman sues over unauthorized use of photos.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Washed Up Baby Daddy's
programme.desc: Chocalote decided to sleep with her sister Jasmine's boyfriend. Fed up with her unemployment, Ashley's husband Jerod started cheating with her friend Gabby. Lane's hot pants got him into some very hot water.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A woman is suing her ex-boyfriend for credit card bills and claims he was physically abusive numerous times, held a gun to her head and she had to file a restraining order against him.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segment features the cases 'Tussling with A Tenant ', ' Standing His Ground ' and ' Going on A Spending Spree'.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Behaving Badly towards a Bride; Unloading three Clunkers; You're Dirty, Dirty, Dirty.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Sisters at War/ 1, 2, 3 and Sold
programme.desc: Sister sues over damaged property; woman sues storage facility over property loss.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Former business partners dispute a $5000 loan given to help pay rent. Then, a plaintiff is suing a client for failure to pay for legal fees. The defendant claims she wasn't made aware of fees during consultation.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: You're All Accused of Severe Child Abuse
programme.desc: Sherry has discovered burn marks on her daughter, and accuses the child's father Mitchell of the crime. Plus, Emil and her fiancé Jamir are accused of physically abusing their children.

programme.title: Maury: My Identical Twin is a Liar ... That's Not Your Baby!
programme.desc: Melody made a mistake about the paternity of her first baby with her man Terrance, but is certain Terrance is the father of her daughter. Kayla was with another man while broken up with Joe; now Joe has lost trust for her, and is denying her son.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Girls Whipped
programme.desc: Ciarra says Megan is trying to put her relationship with her boyfriend Chad on ice. But truth be told, Megan just wants to put Ciarra on ice, giving a new meaning to the term ice bucket challenge!

programme.title: The Mel Robbins Show: On the Edge of Burnout
programme.desc: Stress is at an all-time high, and burnout is now an official medical diagnosis. Mel has quick quiz to help you determine if you're in danger.

programme.title: Movie: Bridesmaids
programme.desc: After being picked as her best friend's maid of honour, a broke woman tries to bluff her way through the expensive bridesmaid rituals.

programme.title: Movie: Get Over It
programme.desc: After being dumped by his girlfriend, a high school basketball star fights to win her back through any means possible. With the help of his friend's sister, he joins the school musical in an effort to get closer to her.

programme.title: Movie: Greenberg
programme.desc: A 40-year-old carpenter from New York goes to Los Angeles to house sit for his brother and his family. He develops a relationship with his brother's assistant while she helps him with the house and the family dog.

programme.title: Movie: Big
programme.desc: A boy awakens as a full-grown man but is not ready to face the adult world.

programme.title: Movie: Little
programme.desc: A woman with a high-pressure career is transformed into a younger version of herself.

programme.title: Movie: Mr. and Mrs. Smith
programme.desc: John and Jane Smith are bored with their domestic life, but both lead a double life. They are deadly assassins, although neither knows about the other, and they are assigned to kill each other after they both miss their latest target.

programme.title: Movie: Bruce Almighty
programme.desc: Bruce, a dissatisfied reporter, finds himself endowed with God's powers. At first he is delighted with all of the things he can do, but he quickly learns how difficult it can be to run the world.

programme.title: Movie: Someone Like You
programme.desc: After being dumped, a talk-show talent scout assumes the identity of a psychoanalyst and writes a scathing column about men.

programme.title: Movie: Hope Floats
programme.desc: A woman returns to her hometown after discovering her husband was having an affair with her best friend.

programme.title: Movie: Intolerable Cruelty
programme.desc: A divorce lawyer meets his match when he falls for the gold-digger he defeated in court.

programme.title: Movie: Living in Oblivion
programme.desc: A man tries to shoot a movie despite the fact that everything that can go wrong, does.

programme.title: Movie: American Animals
programme.desc: Four university students bored with their quiet suburban lives begin imagining pulling off a heist like they've seen in countless movies, but as their plans to steal rare books from the college's library take shape decide to actually go through with it.

programme.title: Movie: Yesterday
programme.desc: A man realizes he is the last person on Earth who remembers the Beatles.

programme.title: Movie: The Nice Guys
programme.desc: In 1970s Los Angeles, private eye Holland March is forced to work with a hired enforcer to solve the case of a missing girl and the apparent suicide of a porn star. As their investigation progresses, they uncover the roots of a large conspiracy.
